policy.categoryFreezeRule: While raw embeds are above rawEmbedSoftBytes, each core-embedded category must stay at or below its freezeMaxFiles and freezeMaxRawBytes unless Aaron explicitly reopens the media-budget decision.
policy.embedSourceMirrorRule: Every file under a declared core assets/embed/<category>/ directory must have a same-stem source file under that category's sourceDir so compressed offline media cannot become orphaned from its provenance/source tier.
policy.informativeEmbedMetadataRule: Every embedded category that presents informative historical media must declare its metadata module and object, and that object must have exactly one alt/caption/credit record per embedded file.
policy.policyStateReadbackRule: The media-budget probe must emit a compact policyState summary showing raw-tier status, active D300/D301/D302/D303 guards, soft/review/hard/file headroom, and zero-headroom frozen categories so future gates can read policy posture without reverse-engineering each step.
policy.sourceOrganizationReadbackRule: The media-budget probe must emit a compact sourceOrganization summary showing declared core categories, embed/source counts, mirror status, and informative metadata coverage so future gates can read source-tier organization without reverse-engineering each step.
policy.sourceInventoryReadbackRule: The media-budget probe must emit a compact sourceInventory summary showing same-stem source/embed parity, source-only files, embed-only files, duplicate stems, extensions, and largest embedded file per declared core category so committed source-tier drift is visible while the core media set is frozen.
policy.declaredCoreEmbedCategoriesWhileFrozenRu: While raw embeds are above rawEmbedSoftBytes and frozen-core posture is active, every file under assets/embed must belong to a declared core category; undeclared category files fail the probe.

performanceProfile.targetHardware: Intel UHD Graphics 617 / 8 GB RAM floor
performanceProfile.method: Browser WebGL profile over the built single-file game. Timing values are warning-only because headless Chrome may report SwiftShader or host GPU rather than the exact player GPU.
performanceProfile.mediaRule: While raw embeds are above the soft warning budget, run this profile before adding new core media or upgrading asset tiers; route heavier footage, HDRI, and model work to an optional HD pack unless Aaron explicitly approves a core-budget exception.

categories.role: Small officer and person badge photos for offline play.
Pre-battle briefing scene photographs and H2 still fallback imagery.

requiredBeforeEnable: explicit budget decision before embedding video bytes

categories.role: Higher-fidelity terrain textures, HDRI, and model files.
requiredBeforeEnable: local file provenance and license proof
optimized runtime file separate from source art

locks.battleBuild: This policy slice does not authorize a new battle, tactical scenario, OOB rewrite, playable USCT battle, Chattanooga, Atlanta/March, Franklin/Nashville, naval, or 1864-65 battle-build track.
locks.tripo: Tripo-related assets remain local-files-only and disabled unless Aaron explicitly approves generation, upload, or credit use in that chat.
locks.h2Video: H2 moving-image slots remain disabled until a later per-asset provenance and budget decision.
